creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
Hi, Alexander!

So far I have got only one question: what about LICENCE (and a
sub-question if we should include sources at our distribution servers
like we do for GNU Linux ports)?

BTW, next time you write a linux-port, try to do fetching like a
packaging server do, i.e.:
# make PACKAGE_BUILDING=YES fetch
;-)

WBR
-- 
bsam
